ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., quiz, project) */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points the assignment is worth */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "grading_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading scale used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_grading_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("grading_scale_id") REFERENCES grading_scales ("grading_scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the criterion belongs to */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criterion */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points the criterion is worth */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the overall grade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the criterion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the submitted file */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade the student received on the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "feedback_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the feedback file */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who graded the submission */,
  "graded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the submission was graded */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, graded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grading_scales" (
  "grading_scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading scale */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grading scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grading_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, TA, student) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the action was taken */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
